should_trigger: Write a tweet announcing the new integration.
Draft a LinkedIn post from the CEO about the launch.
Write an Instagram caption for the product photoshoot.
Draft a Threads post teasing the upcoming feature.
Write a Bluesky post that fits that community's tone.
should_not_trigger: Write a 10-post Twitter thread explaining the architecture.
Draft reply templates for our community managers.
Plan the content calendar for the next month across platforms.
Write a blog post about the integration.
Draft the launch email to the list.
Write the meta title and description for the launch page.
